shortDescription: Local encrypted vault for AI agents. Store API keys, reference as {{PLACEHOLDER}}. Zero cloud.
fullDescription:
EnigmAgent is a local-first encrypted vault designed for AI agent developers and power users.

Store API keys, tokens, passwords, and private documents in an AES-256-GCM encrypted vault on your device. Reference them as {{PLACEHOLDER}} symbols in AI prompts and automation scripts — the vault resolves them at execution time. Nothing leaves your device.

Key features:
• AES-256-GCM + Argon2id key derivation — military-grade encryption
• {{PLACEHOLDER}} reference system for AI tool calls
• Integrates with LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, n8n, and 40+ AI frameworks
• Domain-binding: each secret bound to a specific origin
• 100% offline — no telemetry, no accounts required, no cloud sync
• Works with Windows, macOS, Linux, Android

Huawei device support: Full HMS compatibility, works without Google Play Services.
